content.en:
In the ring.

The Zilin Holy Son was very dignified, and he hadn't forgotten the scene where the light-clothed Holy Maiden killed the Yongyuan Holy Son in one move before.

That one holy technique was too terrifying, and it had already reached the consummation level.

Although he has also cultivated holy skills, in terms of power, he is not as good as a lightly clothed saint.

As for defense, he is actually similar to the Yongyuan Holy Son, so if he fails to prevent the move of the light-clothed saintess, he will also be killed directly.

Therefore, he had to be careful.

As soon as he came to power, the Purple Lin Holy Son instantly cast the Holy Body, and at the same time displayed his own holy technique, the Purple Gold Claw!

With the power of the purple gold claw to protect the whole body, even if the holy skill of the light-clothed saintess is terrifying, there is no way to instantaneously him.

The two have fought each other!

Bang!

The Zilin Holy Son was knocked away, and in terms of attack power, he was not as good as the lightly clothed Holy Maiden.

Crush!

Or being crushed!

Although the Zilin Holy Son has not yet been defeated, the two are not at the same level at all.

Throughout the whole process, the Zilin Holy Son was being hanged.

In a short time, the Zilin Holy Son had already been severely damaged, and if it weren't for the power of the Holy Technique, he would have been defeated long ago.

Ye Tian was also watching the battle, and he could see that the light-clothed saintess did not go all out, at least there were no defensive saint skills.

Once she casts a defensive holy skill, the light-clothed saint girl doesn't need to scruple anything, and directly kills the Zilin Holy Son with the most fierce attack.

Because the attack of the Zilin Holy Son can't help the light-clothed holy girl, but the light-clothed holy woman can hurt the Zilin Holy Son.

In this case, the Light-clothed Holy Maiden would soon be able to kill the Zilin Holy Son.

However, the light-clothed saintess was clumsy and did not use defensive holy skills.

This is also normal, after all, if you are sure to defeat the Zilin Holy Son, why waste your hole cards?

Burst!

Another sword stabbed down, and the power of the Holy Technique Sword Star penetrated the defense of the Zilin Holy Son, completely destroying his physical body, causing the Zilin Holy Son's physical body to completely disintegrate, and he never recovered.

The Son of Zilin was defeated!

The light-clothed saintess defeated the Zilin Holy Son and won the first place.

Subsequently.

The other four saints witnessed the strength of the light-clothed saintess, and none of them gave up the challenge, and challenged the light-clothed saintess one by one.

As a result, these four saints were defeated one by one, and no one could shake the first position of the light-clothed saintess.

At this time, the domain ancestors of the Holy Maiden Gate were very excited one by one.

There is a big difference between the first and the second, and once the first in jihad is obtained, the benefits of the holy woman are too many.

Moreover, they did not think that anyone would be able to defeat the lightly clothed saint.

At this time, the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor sent a message to Ye Tian: "Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, this seat is the Fire Emblem War Ancestor, are you sure to defeat the Light-clothed Saintess?"

Ye Tian nodded, there was no sound transmission, because he transmitted the sound to the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, which was easy to be heard by others.

"Sure!"

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor was surprised.

The strength shown by the light-clothed saintess was so strong, Ye Tian was so sure.

Then there is only one possibility, and that is that Ye Tian has also mastered other holy techniques.

The five saints failed to challenge the light-clothed saintess, leaving only Ye Tian, the saint.

Others felt that Ye Tian would definitely challenge, even if he was not an opponent, he had to give it a try.

In front of everyone's eyes, Ye Tian chose to challenge.

"I, challenge the Saint of Light Clothes!"

Ye Tian said.

Rushing!!

Two took the stage.

The eyes of the light-clothed saintess were full of confidence, and so was Ye Tian.

"You're not nervous?"

The light-clothed saint was a little surprised.

When the five Saint Endowments fought against her before, they were all very nervous, because they knew her strength, so they were extremely dignified.

But Ye Tian was very calm, without a trace of nervousness, as if he was not afraid of her.

Of course, there is also a possibility.

That is, Ye Tian thought that he was doomed, but he just came up and went through the motions, not wanting to win, so he was so calm.

"Why be nervous?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

The light-clothed saint misunderstood Ye Tian's meaning, thinking that Ye Tian was in the second case, just to go through the motions.

At this time, many people thought that Ye Tian's words were giving up the first.

"Sword Star!"

The light-clothed saint stabbed with a sword.

Faced with this holy skill, Ye Tian directly used the holy armor holy technique.

But even so, his Holy Armor Sacred Technique was only a great achievement, while the Holy Skill of the Light-clothed Saint Maiden was complete.

Therefore, this sword made the holy armor formed by the Holy Armor Holy Technique crack a gap, and a trace of power drilled into Ye Tian's body, constantly destroying Ye Tian's body structure.

"It is worthy of the Perfection Holy Technique, this move is very powerful!"

Ye Tian said.

"You're not my opponent, admit defeat!"

The light-clothed saint said.

"Admit defeat?" Ye Tian laughed and said: "I won't admit defeat, your strength is indeed very good, I'm afraid you still hide your strength, otherwise you are not my opponent!"

"Just with your Holy Armor Skill?"

The light-clothed saint smiled.

"No, that's it!"

Ye Tian used the holy technique golden silk!

Burst!!!!

A golden thread instantly tore through the void and slashed towards the light-clothed saint at a terrifying speed.

"Sword Star, slash!"

The light-clothed saint reacted quickly, and instantly cut off the golden thread with the Sword Star Saint Technique.

At this time, she was a little more solemn.

"You've actually practiced two holy skills!"

The light-clothed saint was a little surprised, but she was not very panicked.

Because, Ye Tian's two holy skills are both in the Dacheng realm, and they have not reached the consummation realm.

Maybe just with the Consummation Sword Star Saint Technique, she might not be able to defeat Ye Tian, but she also practiced a Saint Technique.

"Well, for the sake of respect for you, I'm ready to go all out!"

A set of holy clothes appeared on the light-clothed holy woman, and it was a cyan holy robe.

This is not a real clothes, but a defensive holy technique - Tsing Yi!

Moreover, the light-clothed saintess also cultivated the Tsing Yi holy technique to the consummation realm.

The two consummation holy skills, for the two great consummation holy skills, anyone can see that Ye Tian is definitely not an opponent, and he is doomed!

"Defeated!"

Fire Emblem War Ancestor sighed.

When Ye Tian revealed the two holy skills, he also thought that Ye Tian had a great chance of winning.

But now that the light-clothed saintess has shown two great perfection holy skills, how can this be fought?

"She will be able to !!! the two consummation holy techniques"

The five Saint Grants including the Zilin Holy Son were dumbfounded.

If the light-clothed saints go all out, how many moves can they block?

"If you only have such hole cards, then you should admit defeat!"

The light-clothed saint said with a smile.

She wants to see when the time comes, will Ye Tian panic at this time?

"Hole cards, I have them!"

Ye Tian smiled and performed the third holy technique, the Imperial Body!

When the Imperial Body Saint Technique was displayed, Ye Tian's aura skyrocketed, and even the power of the Holy Armor skyrocketed, which was comparable to the Perfection-level Holy Armor Holy Technique!
